description: Processes raw text input and produces a strictly formatted four-part output: 5-bullet Signal Summary, Narrative Compression paragraph, up to 3 Tags, and a 1-sentence Diagnostic Note. Never invents facts; labels missing information as Unknown. Maintains identical output structure on every invocation.

example_response.narrative_compression: A single paragraph of 2-4 sentences compressing the core narrative
example_response.diagnostic_note: Exactly 1 sentence assessing input quality, completeness, and potential gaps
